content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/src/lib/auth.ts:1	import { PrismaAdapter } from "@next-auth/prisma-adapter";2	import { NextAuthOptions } from "next-auth";3	import CredentialsProvider from "next-auth/providers/credentials";4	import { prisma } from "./prisma";5	import bcrypt from "bcryptjs";6	7	export const authOptions: NextAuthOptions = {8	  adapter: PrismaAdapter(prisma),9	  session: {10	    strategy: "jwt",11	  },12	  pages: {13	    signIn: "/login",14	  },15	  providers: [16	    CredentialsProvider({17	      name: "Credentials",18	      credentials: {19	        email: { label: "Email", type: "email" },20	        password: { label: "Password", type: "password" },21	      },22	      async authorize(credentials) {23	        if (!credentials?.email || !credentials?.password) {24	          return null;25	        }26	27	        const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({28	          where: { email: credentials.email },29	        });30	31	        if (!user || !user.password) {32	          return null;33	        }34	35	        const isPasswordValid = await bcrypt.compare(36	          credentials.password,37	          user.password38	        );39	40	        if (!isPasswordValid) {41	          return null;42	        }43	44	        return {45	          id: user.id,46	          email: user.email,47	          name: user.name,48	          role: user.role,49	        };50	      },51	    }),52	  ],53	  callbacks: {54	    async jwt({ token, user }) {55	      if (user) {56	        return {57	          ...token,58	          id: user.id,59	          role: (user as any).role,60	        };61	      }62	      return token;63	    },64	    async session({ session, token }) {65	      return {66	        ...session,67	        user: {68	          ...session.user,69	          id: token.id,70	          role: token.role,71	        },72	      };73	    },74	  },75	};
